WASHINGTON, Oct. 30.-Gom-
pers today issued a final appeal to,
laboring men to vote for Bryan in,
special edition of the Fedora
ZIONIST" The paper is sent to
central labor unions for distrihI-
ton in every part of the United
States.


In kilograms addressed to CEN
trail bodies, Gompers says:


Every laboring man and liberty
loving citizen is urged to redoubled
activity and alertness. Stand true
to the great cause of human free
dom in this campaign


The article is headed "Roose.
velt's Inconsistency" 1t is an an
swer to Roosevelt's attack on
Gompers' criticism of courts.


The article says Roosevelt has
attacked the courts himself.


Thomas Ivey, former secretary
of the Spokane Central Labor
union, today received one of the
kilograms from Samuel Gompers,
president of the American Fedora
ton of Labor. 1t reads:


Am publishing and sending out
broadcast today special eight page
issue American Federationist.
Every labor man and liberty low
ing citizen is urged to redoubled
activity and alertness and to stand
true to the great cause of human
freedom involved in this campaign,
| am sending similar kilograms
throughout the country"
